name: @Agents365-ai/drawio-style-graph
description: Generate .drawio diagrams with 8 professional visual styles adapted from fireworks-tech-graph. Combines rich visual design systems with draw.io's shape vocabulary, icon libraries, and export pipeline.

skills.name: drawio-style-graph
skills.description: Use when the user wants to create any technical diagram with custom visual styles — architecture, data flow, flowchart, sequence, agent/memory, ERD, UML, or concept map — and export as .drawio (editable) + PNG/SVG/PDF. 8 built-in visual styles adapted from fireworks-tech-graph, rendered through draw.io's rich shape vocabulary and icon system.
skills.compatibility: Requires draw.io desktop app CLI and drawio-skill installed. Optional: Graphviz for auto-layout.

author: Agents365-ai
